features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: The vulture has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Gouge
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - Flying pack hunter with poisoning attack
tactical_info.positioning: Uses flight to dive-bomb with pack allies
tactical_info.damage_output: 9 piercing per hit plus poison condition
tactical_info.key_abilities: Pack Tactics with flight mobility, necrotic resistance
tactical_info.weaknesses: Very low AC makes it vulnerable to ranged attacks
tactical_info.synergies: Deadly in flocks, works well with other aerial or pack creatures
